name: Maple Pecan Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine sugar, maple syrup, and milk.
2. Place over low heat and stir until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Cook without stirring to 238 degrees Fahrenheit or until a few drops of the mixture form a soft ball when dropped in cold water.
4. Remove from heat, add butter and salt.
5. Cool to lukewarm, then beat slightly, just until thickened a little.
6. Do not overbeat; it will become too sugary.
7. Quickly stir in the pecans and drop by spoonfuls onto waxed paper.
